candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary line, but it is a company-wide total and not labelled as COGS/cost of sales. Adding it to COGS would risk misallocating overhead and double counting against SG&A-related buckets.
Separate operating depreciation component, but not labelled as relating to Materials and Services/COGS and appears to be part of the broader D&A section rather than a COGS-specific line.
Separate operating amortization component, but not labelled as COGS-specific and appears to sit within the broader D&A block.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is 'Materials and Services'. The excerpt shows no D&A row explicitly tied to COGS/cost of sales. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines at a broader company level, so assigning any of them to COGS would be speculative and could double count.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary line, but it is a total operating D&A line rather than clearly SG&A-specific. Using it for XSGA would likely sweep in non-SG&A portions, including possible COGS and R&D amounts.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit R&D-related amortization line above operating result. Because the separate R&D expense row is not visible in the above-EBIT excerpt and XRD was mapped elsewhere, this is the one potentially relevant operating D&A detail for overhead/R&D treatment.
Separate operating depreciation component, but not clearly tied to SG&A/overhead rather than total operating expenses.
Separate operating amortization component, but not clearly tied to SG&A/overhead rather than total operating expenses.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is the combined set of 'Selling/General/Admin. Expense', 'Employee Expenses', and 'Other Operating Expenses'. The statement provides only broad operating D&A totals/components, not SG&A-specific D&A. Although 'Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses' is explicit, adding it to XSGA_DA would be uncertain because XRD is already mapped separately and XSGA_COMPONENTS intentionally excluded the R&D row. Conservatively leave XSGA_DA empty to avoid double counting.
